title: nephrodium odontocarpos
intro: Nephrodium odontocarpos, also known as the "tooth fern," is a species of fern that belongs to the family Matoniaceae. It is native to tropical Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including relief from fever, pain, and skin conditions, as well as improving digestion and reducing inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk remedies to treat a range of ailments.
